mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS student_id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, DATE_FORMAT(s.birth_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS birth_date, s.status, ci.class_name, gi.grade_name, gi.entry_year, m.major_name, c.college_name, ss.phone, ss.email, ss.address FROM `user` u JOIN student s ON s.student_no = u.user_name JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = s.class_id JOIN grade_info gi ON gi.id = ci.grade_id JOIN major m ON m.id = ci.major_id JOIN college c ON c.id = m.college_id LEFT JOIN student_sensitive ss ON ss.student_id = s.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT s.id FROM `user` u JOIN student s ON s.student_no = u.user_name WHERE u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM student WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM class_info WHERE class_code = #{classCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM course WHERE course_code = #{courseCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM semester_info WHERE semester_name = #{semesterName} LIMIT 1

SELECT ci.id, ci.class_code, ci.class_name, gi.grade_name, m.major_name FROM class_info ci JOIN grade_info gi ON gi.id = ci.grade_id JOIN major m ON m.id = ci.major_id ORDER BY gi.entry_year DESC, ci.class_code ASC
SELECT id, course_code, course_name FROM course ORDER BY course_code ASC
SELECT id, semester_name, school_year, term_no FROM semester_info ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT v.student_id, v.student_no, v.name, v.gender, DATE_FORMAT(v.birth_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS birth_date, v.status, v.class_name, v.grade_name, v.entry_year, v.major_name, v.college_name, v.phone, v.email, v.id_card, v.address, CAST(v.family_income AS CHAR) AS family_income, v.bank_card FROM v_student_profile v WHERE v.student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (class_id, student_no, name, gender, birth_date, status) VALUES ( #{request.classId}, #{request.studentNo}, #{request.name}, #{request.gender}, NULLIF(#{request.birthDate}, ''), COALESCE(#{request.status}, 1) )

INSERT INTO student_sensitive (student_id, phone, email, id_card, address, family_income, bank_card) VALUES ( #{studentId}, NULLIF(#{request.phone}, ''), NULLIF(#{request.email}, ''), NULLIF(#{request.idCard}, ''), NULLIF(#{request.address}, ''), #{request.familyIncome}, NULLIF(#{request.bankCard}, '') )

INSERT INTO student_sensitive (student_id, phone, email, address) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE phone = VALUES(phone), email = VALUES(email), address = VALUES(address)
INSERT INTO student_score (student_id, course_id, semester_id, score) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{request.courseId}, #{request.semesterId}, #{request.score})
